name: graphify
description: Turn files into a knowledge graph with HTML, JSON, audit trail, and MCP-backed graph access.

interface.shortDescription: Build knowledge graphs from files, docs, code, papers, and images
interface.longDescription: Use Graphify to turn folders of code, documents, papers, and media into a navigable knowledge graph with audit trail, graph outputs, and MCP-backed access.
defaultPrompt: Run Graphify on this folder and explain the key communities and relationships.
